basic_details.job_title: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant and Field Investigators Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 4 Research Assistant and Field Investigators Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D./M.Phil./Post graduate in social science discipline with minimum 55% marks.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Ph.D./M.Phil./Post graduate in social science discipline with minimum 55% marks. Field Investigators: Post graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: Research Assistant: ₹37,000/- per month (Consolidated); Field Investigators: ₹20,000/- per month (Consolidated)
salary_details.details: Research Assistant: ₹37,000/- per month (Consolidated) Field Investigators: ₹20,000/- per month (Consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Sri Venkateswara College Delhi to complete the application.
